reviews.text: Julien is absolutely incredible. His professionalism, gentle spirit, fun nature, and expertise greatly contributed our wedding day being seamless. Julien knew exactly what to do to accomplish perfect lighting for our gorgeous photos. I have never felt more beautiful. We were amazed by our same day sneak peaks and couldn’t wait to see the rest. I’m beyond grateful we trusted Julien with our special day. Our overall experience was the best and I would recommend him to anyone wanting to make their dreams come true.

I recently had Julien cover our proposal in Telluride, and I could not be happier with how everything turned out. From the start, he was prompt, friendly, and extremely professional. He made the entire process feel easy and even gave advice on other aspects of planning the trip which was very helpful.

Julien was also excellent at suggesting locations and timing. He suggested a different time than what I had in mind and the views were spectacular at the time he suggested. He clearly knows the area well and gave me practical advice on how to plan the proposal, what to expect, and how to get there without stress. He also knew the exact spots that had great views but were also not popular look out stations so that we had the entire spot to ourselves when I proposed. He reached earlier to make sure everything was okay and shared the location so that it was easy for us. That guidance alone was a huge help.

I am generally awkward when it comes to taking photos, but Julien made us feel comfortable right away and gave clear, simple direction that helped us pose naturally without it feeling forced. And the pictures were amazing. The quality and the way he captured the moment felt perfect, without feeling to intrusive and we are genuinely glad we chose him for something this important.

If you are looking for a photographer in western Colorado who is reliable, easy to work with, and truly knows how to capture a big moment, I would absolutely recommend Julien.
Julien made our surprise engagement absolutely perfect! These photos he captured of the moment were everything I could’ve hoped for 🤗 highly recommend

Julien captured our engagement photos and from start to finish, working with him was a fantastic experience. He was incredibly patient, kind, and clearly very knowledgeable. He had great recommendations for locations & poses. He made us feel comfortable and confident the whole time, and the final photos exceeded our expectations. I would highly recommend him to anyone looking for a photographer who is both talented and a pleasure to work with!!

I had never been Telluride before and thought it would be a great place to propose. I contacted Julien, and he gave me several options of engagement spots and helped map out the whole proposal plan. Julien captured the proposal perfectly against an amazing backdrop. He did a great job of staying discreet and keeping the moment private and a surprise. Julien also did a great job directing poses for photos after the fact, giving great directions and ideas for pictures. He also gave also gave awesome recommendations for restaurants and things to do in Telluride which made planning the trip much easier. I highly recommend!
